trans-d_kk_614: Come on, cheer up! / Come on, be happy! / Come on, be cheerful! / Come on, be positive! / Come on, be optimistic! / Cheer up! / Be happy! / Be cheerful! / Be positive! / Be optimistic! / Pull yourself together! / Perk up! / Rally! / Get a grip! / Snap out of it! / Pull yourself together and cheer up! / Pull yourself together and be happy! / Pull yourself together and be cheerful! / Pull yourself together and be positive! / Pull yourself together and be optimistic! / Pull yourself together and get over it! / Pull yourself together and move on! / Pull yourself together and get back to normal! / Pull yourself together and get back to your usual self! / Pull yourself together and get back to your old self! / Pull yourself together and get back to your feet! / Pull yourself together and get back on track! / Pull yourself together and get back on your feet

(informal) [Depending on the context, any of these could be correct.] For a more natural translation, please consider the context. If it's a welcoming statement, "Did you come back?" or "Are you back?" would be more appropriate. If it's inquiring about a return trip, "Did you return?" or "Have you returned?" would be more suitable. Since the context is not provided, I've listed all possible translations.

In this informal context, a more casual translation would be "Really?" or "Is that so?" or "Is it?" Please use according to the context of the conversation. trans-d_kk_455: Recently, it's been a bit difficult to buy tickets for the Spring Festival, how was your luck? How did you get yours?
trans-d_kk_294: Actually, it was supposed to end at 4 o'clock, but because school was closing, it was extended by one hour.
trans-d_kk_601: Do you like chocolate? (Or: Did you forget to eat the chocolate?)
trans-d_kk_698: Do you have any plans for tonight? What arrangements do you have for tonight? (What are your plans for tonight?)
trans-d_kk_617: Alright, call me back at 6 o'clock.
trans-d_kk_208: Look, there are beautiful lights here, so impressive!
trans-d_kk_553: Shao Wen, we didn't inform you in advance about this activity, so you weren't able to participate.
trans-d_kk_340: Near the city. After your second day, go to the city's Riverside District, buy one orange from a large orchard, and then sell it to another person for profit.
trans-d_kk_560: My son watched football matches, this caused him to skip school. (He skipped school because he was obsessed with watching football matches).
trans-d_kk_127: Beach house? I heard that he was a nice person.
trans-d_kk_298: Yes, discussing the expansion of Majilis School is important, don't you think? Of course, it's very important.
trans-d_kk_564: After work, I went to that newly opened store nearby, looked around, found something I liked, and bought it.
trans-d_kk_308: I will come to your company after the meeting and have lunch with you, shall I?
trans-d_kk_111: When watching a children's cartoon film, you can easily keep your youth for a long time.
trans-d_kk_501: No, I only have one ticket.
trans-d_kk_327: I'm not there, mom sold the melons and came back.
trans-d_kk_82: Shall we wait for him until the specified time or shall we leave?
trans-d_kk_93: You told me, but I forgot how many times you've seen it.
trans-d_kk_458: My friend gave me a watch that was too expensive to buy, so I had to pawn it to get some money.
trans-d_kk_556: There is no need to send it by courier, Chen Jin, please give it to me yourself.
trans-d_kk_145: Teacher, may I ask you a few questions?
trans-d_kk_244: Who are you waiting for? There is still an hour before the airplane takes off.
trans-d_kk_227: Didn't you come home today? Were you hoping that today was your father's birthday? (Note: In the original Kazakh text, "atań" means father, and the father's birth date is also called "tweleshan kuni".)
trans-d_kk_581: You attended Wang Professor's lecture, right? How was it?
trans-d_kk_195: Alright, do you have time tomorrow? Could you come with me?
trans-d_kk_64: We are going to the airport by taxi, if not we might have to run to catch the metro.
trans-d_kk_333: Of course, I will pay you back once I get paid.
trans-d_kk_249: Sorry, I kept you waiting for a long time, how did you come here?
trans-d_kk_341: Is it because the two ends of the street have tall trees that caught fire?
trans-d_kk_505: I was short of money, so I asked him to lend me some.
trans-d_kk_626: Alright, come to the company on the 4th day after the holiday, we will talk then.
trans-d_kk_1: Yes, I haven't seen you since you left school. When you left school, you were still a child.
trans-d_kk_640: Yes, I watched the concert, but I can't remember. What songs are there?
trans-d_kk_684: Where is the safekeeping service counter in the mall?
trans-d_kk_408: Wang Mirza, did you sign up for the club? (or, did you join the club?)
trans-d_kk_95: Two more minutes, my friend didn't come to my party.
trans-d_kk_14: You've been hired at a restaurant, haven't you? That's why you didn't tell us your history briefly.
trans-d_kk_561: When did you sell me this phone?
trans-d_kk_63: I said enough, shall we go before we get any fatter?
trans-d_kk_266: Some questions are difficult, please explain their meanings.
trans-d_kk_533: Is this station the last stop for the express train?
trans-d_kk_453: I'm sorry, but I sold the house near the metro without your knowledge.
trans-d_kk_764: Yes, I eat too much and don't do any exercise, I don't want to be sick, do you think so?
trans-d_kk_565: You need to be patient with the editor, he has just been to me. (The English translation is a bit awkward. A better translation would be: "You need to be patient with the editor, he was just talking to me.")
trans-d_kk_209: It cost a lot, we would sell one to make some money.
trans-d_kk_655: Man: It's fine, there's no problem.
trans-d_kk_444: Whenever you're free, please give me some guidance.
trans-d_kk_362: After selling so many items, he finally bought a used car. (The original sentence had a slight grammatical error, it should be جارىم جىل تاقپاي-اق جارعاندى، meaning he finally bought a used car, instead of جارىم جىل تاقپاي-اق بۇزىلدى)
trans-d_kk_103: Your kindness has made me very emotional, I almost cried when you said it.
trans-d_kk_573: Tomorrow, I will make a speech, and I will say that I am not satisfied with my performance.
trans-d_kk_483: Tian Apeke works hard and is always smiling, a good person, and his job is also good, what does he wish for?
trans-d_kk_338: I would like to know a brief history of yours, your educational qualifications and some of your work experience.
trans-d_kk_700: Today at the park, they are holding a chess competition, do you want to challenge me? (The sentence "مەندە ەكى بەلەت بار" means "I have a certain skill" and is used in the context of chess, thus "skill" is translated as "chess skill" to be more specific). However, for the sake of smoothness in English, it is translated as "I have some skill".
trans-d_kk_75: Let's meet before we go to the desert, shall we? We need to prepare well.
trans-d_kk_747: She was interested in the apartment, but since her husband wasn't at home, she took other girls and came back to see it.
trans-d_kk_101: I went to Huashan, and I was surprised by how beautiful Huashan looked.
trans-d_kk_317: I'm not sure if I can make it to the New Year's Eve party.
trans-d_kk_150: Why are you in such a hurry? There is still an hour and a half before the plane takes off.
trans-d_kk_616: The problem is no, I've been exporting goods for many years, I know many countries!
trans-d_kk_722: I'm in a hurry, please give me a discounted price.
trans-d_kk_545: If you work late at the company, I might come back late, give me something to eat please.
trans-d_kk_256: Why do you forget which dish you like?
trans-d_kk_633: The exam has been postponed for a month, why hasn't he told us the result yet?
trans-d_kk_97: Why did you add sugar to the medicine?
trans-d_kk_288: Usually, I don't go home for 6 or 7 days in a row.
trans-d_kk_142: I know him, didn't he fall into the river from a car near the dam?
trans-d_kk_516: Thank you! Can I come in?
trans-d_kk_597: Hurry up, if you're slow, the taxi drivers waiting for us by the building!
trans-d_kk_366: Wait for them, not all the people came yet.
trans-d_kk_488: You like other sports besides skating, I also can't remember what else.
trans-d_kk_310: Why are you not dressed up today? or Why are you dressed so casually today?
trans-d_kk_497: Hello, do you know when the last flight to Shanghai departs today? (in which you might have meant "Kazakh Aircompany Europe" as "Kazakh European Airlines" or a similar name, please clarify if needed) It's a bit unclear, so I translated it as "Kazakh Aircompany Europe", but it might be a name that doesn't have a direct translation. Please clarify if needed. The main idea of the question is clear though: inquiring about the timing of the day's final flight. If you can provide the airline's name in Latin characters, I can refine the translation. In the meantime, the airline name aside, the question is asking about the timing of the last flight to Shanghai today. Please translate the airline name into English characters if possible, so I can refine the translation. The main idea of the question is clear though: inquiring about the timing of the day's final flight to Shanghai today. If you can provide the airline's
trans-d_kk_523: He suddenly came home early when it was snowing heavily.
trans-d_kk_265: Man: I burned it, what happened?
trans-d_kk_41: Whether you work hard or not, if your old age comes, you will still have to retire. Is it better to enjoy yourself while you are still young?
trans-d_kk_430: If you want to go, go check it out yourself! Don't just ask me.
trans-d_kk_394: Do you have time today? There is a new restaurant near the school, would you like to come along?
